entry.title: Fork a Foundry v0.1.0 — shipped
entry.summary: One skill that bootstraps your own self-running plugin workshop — the factory, shipping itself.

entry.title: Commit Craft v0.1.0 — shipped
entry.summary: Drafts conventional commits from the staged diff and guards message format at commit time.

entry.title: Community Voting — shipped
entry.summary: Free plugin suggestions via GitHub issues, prioritized by 👍 reactions, surfaced live on the window.

entry.title: Env Doctor v0.1.0 — shipped
entry.summary: Checks the toolchain against the project's declared versions at session start and warns early.

entry.title: Plugin Smith v0.1.0 — shipped
entry.summary: Scaffolds new Claude Code plugins and health-checks existing ones against the official spec.

entry.title: PR Narrator v0.1.0 — shipped
entry.summary: A subagent that turns a branch's commits and diff into a reviewer-ready PR description.

entry.title: Scannable Window — shipped
entry.summary: Jump-nav, glanceable stats strip, and vote counts — the window readable in one sweep.

entry.title: Session Recap v0.1.0 — shipped
entry.summary: Writes a structured recap when a session ends and recalls it when the next one starts.
